name: Deep Company Series
description_en: Produce an 8-part deep-dive research series on a single company, covering business, moat, management, industry, risks, valuation, thesis, and action plan.
description_zh: 针对一家公司产出 8 篇深度研究系列，覆盖生意本质、护城河、管理层、行业、风险、估值、投资论文与行动计划。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It breaks one company into eight long-form research pieces, each with explicit pass/fail/gray conclusions and price-range guidance.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。把一家公司拆成八篇长文研究，每篇都给出明确的通过/不通过/灰色结论与价格区间建议。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/ and performs web searches for financial data. No external accounts required; verify valuation inputs before investing.
sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具，并为财务数据执行网络搜索。无需外部账号；投资前请核实估值输入。
